codexRole: Orchestrate the workflow, write code, run checks, and persist task state while keeping prompts compact.
geminiHints: Use the public GitHub repository as the primary code context.
Prefer reading the repo link and referenced paths over asking Codex to paste large code blocks.
Focus on planning and QA drafts; keep responses concise and structured.
claudeHints: Use the local Claude project context plus the task card as the primary review context.
Focus on regressions, validation gaps, scene or resource stability, and lifecycle risks.
Keep review findings compact, actionable, and tied to acceptance gaps.
